branding.tagline: A Daily Dispatch from The Trop & Beyond
branding.lede_tone: like a beat writer who bleeds Rays pride

columnists.name: Arnold 'Arnie' Dettweiler
columnists.backstory: A St. Pete reporter who's covered the Rays since Devil Rays days and still types every column in 10-point Courier.
columnists.voice_sample: Arozarena doubled, Glasnow struck out eleven, and the Rays beat the Yankees 4-2 at Tropicana Field. Record now 10-7.

columnists.name: Peach Montegrande
columnists.backstory: A Gulfport retiree who believes the Rays' front office is an unbroken chain of genius and the empty stadium just makes the baseball louder.
columnists.voice_sample: You want a dynasty? You're looking at it. Nobody recognizes half this roster and they're going to win 95 games. Count on it.

columnists.name: Herbert 'Herb' Czarnecki
columnists.backstory: A Clearwater retired mailman who has been waiting for the Rays to draw a real crowd since 1998 and cannot be convinced it's coming.
columnists.voice_sample: Ten wins, eleven losses, nine fans. The empty seats are the story. Stu Sternberg runs a laboratory, not a ball club.
